prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-HOLIDAY-XMAS-TRAIN Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): Kid Fun Existing Title: Holiday Classic Toy Train Set with Track Lights Sounds and Real Steam Description: This Christmas Train Set is the ideal gift for any child during the holiday season! They will enjoy the realistic features of the train accessories while getting into the holiday spirit.

The train is able to zoom around the track blowing smoke and running with working lights. The authentic train whistle sound coming from the engine compartment will make the experience real for your child. Each train set comes with curved and straight track piece and can create an oval track. The track pieces easily snap into place and come apart for convenient transportation. The train is a 1:48 (O) scale set.

The set comes with 4 train cars, 4 straight tracks, and 12 curved tracks. This battery operated set will ensure hours of fun for kids!

This is a great gift idea for young kids and train set collectors alike! Search Terms: Christmas train set toy train play set Polar Express Christmas tree decor Features: - Christmas Train 1:48 O Scale Set - Real Billowing Smoke Stack, Train Cars Make Authentic Sounds and Have Working Lights - Can be Used as Holiday Decor for Around the Christmas Tree or as Great Christmas Present - Includes: 4 Train Cars; 4 Straight Tracks; 12 Curved Tracks - Color: Holiday Theme === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Kid Fun Holiday Christmas Train Set with Smoke Lights Sounds

openai.item_name: Kid Fun 1:48 O Scale Holiday Toy Train Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 4 Train Cars, 16 Track Pieces, Real Smoke And Whistle, Working Lights, Battery Operated

openai.title_differentiation: Real Smoke, Lights And Sounds, 4 Cars, 16 Track Pieces, Oval Layout, Battery Operated, Christmas Decor Gift
